zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Mortimer於1314年出生時，她的父親Robert de Mortimer68歲，母親Joyce de la Zouche59歲。她於1316年與Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Mortimer于1314年出生时，她的父亲Robert de Mortimer68岁，母亲Joyce de la Zouche59岁。她于1316年与Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham在英国諾福爾可柏斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Mortimer was born in 1314, her father, Robert de Mortimer, was 68 and her mother, Joyce de la Zouche, was 59. She married Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham in 1316, in Paston, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1360, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Mortimer est née en 1314, son père, Robert de Mortimer, avait 68 ans et sa mère, Joyce de la Zouche, avait 59 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham en 1316, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1360, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Mortimer 1314 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Mortimer 68 und ihre Mutter Joyce de la Zouche 59. Sie hat 1316 in Paston, Norfolk, England Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Mortimer è nata il nel 1314, sua padre, Robert de Mortimer, aveva 68 anni e sua madre, Joyce de la Zouche, aveva 59 anni. Lei sposato Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham nel 1316, nel Paston, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1360, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Mortimerが1314年に生まれた時，父Robert de Mortimerは68歳，母Joyce de la Zoucheは59歳であった。1316年にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンでSir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年に46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Mortimer(이)가 1314년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Mortimer(은)는 68세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce de la Zouche(은)는 59세였다. 그녀는 1316년 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Mortimer nasceu em 1314, seu pai, Robert de Mortimer, tinha 68 anos e sua mãe, Joyce de la Zouche, tinha 59 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham em 1316, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1360, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Mortimer родилась в 1314 г., её отцу по имени Robert de Mortimer было 68 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce de la Zouche, 59. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham в 1316 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1360 г. в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Mortimer nació en 1314, su papá, Robert de Mortimer, tenía 68 años y su mamá, Joyce de la Zouche, tenía 59 años. Se casó con Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham en 1316, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1360, a la edad de 46 años.
